text.title: lint-ruff-and-biome-as-default Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lint-ruff-and-biome-as-default as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Keeping ESLint installed "for the team's existing rules" while adding biome on the side.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The two formatters fight on quotes, semicolons, and trailing commas; the inner loop becomes "biome fixes, eslint un-fixes, repeat" and tests never get to run.

failure-mode.description: Leaving the old `.eslintrc.js` "for the IDE" after switching the CLI/hooks to biome.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: VS Code's ESLint extension still applies the old rules on save while biome rewrites them on commit; the file ping-pongs and the diff is unreviewable.
